title: I Got a Woman
album: The Rolling Stone Magazines 500 Greatest Songs Of All Time
why_this_song: I Got a Woman by Ray Charles (1954) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Well... I got a woman, way over town"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Well... I got a woman, way over town"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "That's good to me, oh yeah!"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "That's good to me, oh yeah!"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Yeah, she's a kind of friend indeed"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: That's good to me, oh yeah!
Said I got a woman, way over town
She gives me money when I'm in need
She saves her loving, early in the morning
She saves her loving, just for me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "woman" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "woman" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "town" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well... I got a woman, way over town
She saves her loving, just for me
I got a woman, way over town

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "I Got a Woman" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "I Got a Woman", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I Got a Woman" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I Got a Woman" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "I Got a Woman", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "I Got a Woman", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
